subcodes.first_line: O my God! O my God! This servant hath been enraptured by Thy call, hath hearkened unto Thy summons, and hath believed in Thee and in Thy signs, and hath testified to the truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذا عبد انجذب بخطابک و اجاب بندائک و آمن بک و بایاتک و صدق
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant
